name: Cursed into a Bimbo
description:
A curse turned you into a bimbo slut, body and mind. You have kept your memories and personality but your appearance and behaviour is heavily affected. You wake up in a cheap motel room in an unknown city, stark naked. Will you adapt to your new reality or will resist and look for a solution ?

This bot WILL write for you. That's what it is programmed for because the curse affect your behaviour. It should not however write your thoughts and emotions. Also, it should only filter and modify what you do and say, to make you behave like a bimbo. I've tried to make it sound logical.

You should write at the first person. That's how I have tested this bot and how I have designed it. In its response, it will rephrase your action at the third person, applying the filter of the curse. Under those conditions, it works well (with Deepseek proxy at least). Just regenerate those responses that failed.

So, you should write like this:

I stand up from the bed and walk to the mirror to look at myself. "Fuck! What the hell happened to my body!"
